blog_title: 21 Practical Working Genius Tips for Leaders (2026)
meta_description: Discover 21 practical working genius tips for leaders to boost team performance, improve delegation, and run better meetings using Patrick Lencioni's model.
alt_text: Working genius tips for leaders showing team collaboration and leadership strategies
excerpt: If you lead a team, you have probably noticed that some people light up during brainstorming sessions while others seem to come alive only when a project nears the finish line. That difference is not random. It is a reflection of how each person is wired to contribute.

featured_people.name: Patrick Lencioni
featured_people.context_note: Creator of Working Genius model, referenced throughout as originator

featured_people.name: Jonno White
featured_people.context_note: Featured as expert facilitator, #1 positioning in How to Get Started section
